{{Infobox location
| name = Harness
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Harness is a world characterized by a vast, monster-filled wilderness that connects various walled settlements, such as [[Sarcoline City]]. Unlike other realms, the inhabitants of Harness do not utilize [[sacred arts]]; instead, they rely on contracted monsters to perform tasks and exert influence. The environment is so dominated by creatures that the entire world appears to resist certain external forces. While local legends circulate among the walled cities, there is a sense that the existing apex monsters may not be prepared for threats originating from beyond this world's boundaries.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Harness is a wilderness where every inhabitant is a monster and the people do not practice the [[sacred arts]]. This location serves as a repository for [[Abidan]] files regarding security measures and is a place where legends spread from [[Sarcoline City]] to various other walled cities. During a past conflict, the entire world of Harness pushed back against [[Dross]], yet it remains an iteration that may be unable to withstand threats exceeding its local monsters. Consequently, characters are currently working to ensure the [[fate]] of this iteration is not derailed.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|People in [[Harness]] do not practice the [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Harness]] is a location containing [[Abidan]] files on security measures.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Harness]] is a wilderness where everything is a monster.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Harness]] is a location or entity that may be unable to handle threats beyond the current world's monsters.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Harness]] is an event or iteration whose [[fate]] the characters are attempting not to derail.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The entire world of [[Harness]] pushed back against [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Harness]] is a place where legends spread from [[Sarcoline City]] to other walled cities.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
